query: SELECT 'users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users WHERE openId LIKE 'demo_%' UNION ALL SELECT 'profiles', COUNT(*) FROM profiles UNION ALL SELECT 'sessions', COUNT(*) FROM sessions UNION ALL SELECT 'communityPosts', COUNT(*) FROM communityPosts UNION ALL SELECT 'communityAnswers', COUNT(*) FROM communityAnswers;
